name: 高府廊下
description: 连接高府前后院的曲折回廊。红漆柱子，雕花栏杆。廊下摆放着一张铺着软垫的长椅，旁边小几上有剥好的葡萄和团扇。微风吹过，廊外的庭院花草摇曳。
visual_reference: A winding covered corridor in an ancient Chinese manor. Red wooden pillars, carved railings. A wooden bench with soft cushions, a small table with peeled grapes and a round fan. Gentle breeze, garden plants visible outside. Warm daylight, romantic yet melancholic vibe, highly detailed.
lighting: 阳光透过廊檐斜射进来，形成规律的光斑，微风带来光影的晃动。
emotional_range: 昏昏欲睡的慵懒与小心翼翼的偷吻。
